nasb.text: He will take the best of your fields and your vineyards and your olive groves and give them to his servants.

esv.text: He will take the best of your fields and vineyards and olive orchards and give them to his servants.

cnv.text: 他必奪去你們最好的田地、葡萄園和橄欖園，賜給自己的臣僕。

ccb.text: 他会夺去你们最好的田地、葡萄园和橄榄园，送给他的臣仆。
